title: selago trinervia
intro: Selago trinervia, also known as Three-veined Cape Caper or Three-veined Selago, is a flowering plant native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Selago trinervia include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Selago trinervia are typically made from the leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and topical creams for various health applications.
